questions.question: 11 (a) The isotope hydrogen-1 has a proton number of 1 and a nucleon number of 1. Two isotopes of helium are helium-3 and helium-4. Helium-3 has a proton number of 2 and a nucleon number of 3. Helium-4 has a nucleon number of 4. Complete Table 11.1 for neutral atoms of these isotopes of helium.
